directoryDescription: A structured directory page is being prepared for verified public business profiles and offers.
verifyCardDescription: A secure verification flow is being prepared for checking membership card status without exposing private data.
signInDescription: Phone-first authentication is available through Supabase Auth.
signUpDescription: The membership request entry point is being prepared with the required security and validation steps.
signOutDescription: The sign-out flow is being prepared. You can return to the home page from here.
dashboardDescription: A private member dashboard shell is being prepared for membership status, card details, and account actions.
introduceDescription: A guided Business Introduction request flow is being prepared for eligible members.
adminDescription: An administrative workspace shell is being prepared for moderation, review queues, and operational controls.
termsDescription: The Terms of Use page is being prepared and will contain the applicable platform rules.
privacyDescription: The Privacy Policy page is being prepared and will describe how data is handled and protected.
cookieDescription: The Cookie Policy page is being prepared and will describe cookie usage and related preferences.
contactDescription: The contact page is being prepared for official support and legal communication channels.
refundDescription: The refund policy page is being prepared and will describe subscription fee handling where required by law.
clubRulesDescription: The club rules page is being prepared and will describe member conduct, moderation, and access expectations.
partnerRulesDescription: The partner rules page is being prepared and will describe business profile requirements and moderation standards.
introductionRulesDescription: The Business Introduction rules page is being prepared and will describe the admin-mediated request lifecycle.
disclaimerDescription: The disclaimer page is being prepared and will clarify platform information boundaries before production launch.
